Scree Plot for PCA

qc_pca_scree_plot7.Rd

Generates a scree plot showing the proportion of variance for each principal component.

Usage

qc_pca_scree_plot7(pca, max_pc = NULL, text.sizes = c(16, 14, 14))

Arguments

pca

A prcomp object resulting from PCA analysis.

max_pc

The maximum number of PCs to display in the scree plot. Default: NULL (shows all PCs)

text.sizes

A numeric vector specifying text sizes for different plot elements: title, axis titles, axis labels. Default: c(16, 14, 14)

Value

A list containing the scree plot and the data used for plotting.

Details

This function visualizes the variance explained by each principal component in the PCA analysis.

See also

cli_abort

Examples

if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{
if(interactive()){
 # Example usage
 qc_pca_scree_plot7(pca)
 }
} # }
